heading: Short title
label: 51 Short title
text: This chapter shall be known by the short title of “United States Cotton Standards Act.”
notes: Effective Date, , provided:Act Mar. 4, 1923, ch. 288, § 1442 Stat. 1520“That this Act [enacting this chapter] shall become effective on and after .”August 1, 1923
amendments: Effective Date, , provided:Act Mar. 4, 1923, ch. 288, § 1442 Stat. 1520“That this Act [enacting this chapter] shall become effective on and after .”August 1, 1923
